text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I was so disappointed I lost that last race and
couldn't stand center stage...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But! I'm definitely making my comeback today!
I'm gonna run cute and win cute!
choice_data_list: Leave the cheering and chanting to me!
Leave the cheering and chanting to me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All right, thanks! I hope you're ready, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Because I'm gonna show you how I sparkle at the
winning concert! ☆
